hero_product_name: the AnyWell YS16-1 PLUS electric wheelchair from the white-background reference photos
campaign_goal: Create three high-conversion 24-second Meta-style vertical ads for the AnyWell YS16-1 PLUS, emotionally inspired by the universal feeling of getting back outdoors near home.
target_audience: Heavy-set or plus-size American seniors age 60+, their spouses, and adult children buying mobility support for loved ones.
core_selling_points:
- now $599, reg. $999
- 500W dual motors for grass and gentle slopes
- 22-inch first-class wide seat
- supports up to 330 lbs
- folds in seconds for the trunk
use_scenarios:
- porch and finished ramp exit
- backyard path near trees
- quiet sunset lane near home
visual_style: Realistic, warm, outdoor, sales-driven, portrait-first American lifestyle advertising with strong product readability.
style_tone: persuasive, warm, calm, dignified, practical, never clinical
consistency_anchor: Match the real YS16-1 PLUS wheelchair from the white-background product photos while keeping it only in normal open riding position. Preserve the right-side joystick, wide seat feel, frame, footrest, wheel layout, and real product silhouette. Keep the rear/top-back area compact and proportional to the real chair: no extra rods, poles, antenna-like parts, cane-like extensions, or exaggerated push bars behind the backrest. If short integrated rear handles are naturally visible, keep them subtle, short, and close to the backrest. In every shot, keep the rider and wheelchair proportion close to c1 and c2: the rider naturally fills the broad seat, the chair reads substantial and premium, and neither subject looks oversized or undersized relative to the other.
additional_info: Hard Meta ad rules: heavy-set or plus-size American senior male rider age 60+ only, same adult female spouse across connected scenes, three shots at about 8 seconds each, seamless real-world B-roll only, no white-background cut-ins, and simple safe actions only. Use Jean's uploaded clip only as emotional reference for quiet freedom outdoors near home. Do not recreate a real person, real home, unfinished ramp, bare-tree woods layout, or testimonial comment. Do not place any readable ad copy, price tags, UI overlays, or gibberish text inside the generated footage itself. Keep each shot clean and reserve negative space only for optional post-production overlays added later.
music: Warm restrained cinematic underscore with light piano and a subtle modern pulse.

concepts.title: Nature Feels Close Again
concepts.core_theme: A husband returns to the backyard path while his wife follows with relief and warmth.
concepts.main_theme: Nature should not feel out of reach.
concepts.hook: Nature should not feel out of reach.
concepts.cta: Shop the AnyWell YS16-1 PLUS now.
concepts.visual_style: Warm morning backyard path near trees, spouse nearby, emotional but sales-ready.
concepts.continuity_rider_anchor: Keep the same heavy-set American senior husband age 60+ and the same wife across all three shots. He should visibly fill the wide seat naturally, with chair scale and framing similar to c1 and c2.
concepts.use_scenarios:
- doorway to yard path
- tree-lined backyard route
- smiling trust close
concepts.additional_info: This concept should feel closest to the universal emotional shape of Jean's clip, without matching the original house or woods.

shots.scene_description: A heavy-set white-haired American senior man in his 60s begins to drive the YS16-1 PLUS from a generic back doorway toward a yard path while his wife follows with a relieved smile. The framing should feel like c1 and c2: medium-wide, the rider and chair dominate the portrait frame, the wide seat clearly supports his body, and the wheelchair looks full-sized and premium rather than tiny. Leave clean upper-left or upper-right negative space, but keep the generated footage itself free of in-scene ad text or UI.
shots.camera_movement: smooth front-side push from doorway toward the yard, calm and steady
shots.lighting: soft morning daylight with warm highlights and natural depth
shots.composition_and_set_dressing: portrait medium-wide composition, rider and chair large in frame, generic home details only, no exact source-house cues
shots.transition_anchor: end with the chair rolling forward toward the trees
shots.voiceover_en: Nature should not feel out of reach.
shots.key_message: The outdoors can begin right at home.
shots.sfx: soft wheel roll, birds, and light morning ambience

shots.scene_description: The same husband glides smoothly along a generic tree-lined backyard path with his right hand clearly on the joystick while his wife walks a step behind, smiling. Keep the framing close to c1 and c2: the rider visibly fills the 22-inch seat naturally, thighs supported, torso proportionate to the backrest, and the chair remains large and balanced in frame. Reserve clean negative space only, and keep the generated footage itself free of in-scene ad text or UI.
shots.camera_movement: steady joystick-side front-profile tracking shot with subtle forward drift
shots.lighting: clean daylight filtered through trees with premium but realistic contrast
shots.composition_and_set_dressing: portrait medium shot with rider and chair taking most of the frame height, simple path and trees, spouse softly visible
shots.transition_anchor: end with a calm smile and steady forward motion
shots.voiceover_en: With a wide twenty-two inch seat and smooth five-hundred watt dual motors, getting outside feels easy again.
shots.key_message: Comfort and power become visible proof.
shots.sfx: smooth motor ambience, leaves, and light outdoor air

shots.scene_description: The husband and wife pause and smile in a clean lifestyle hero frame. He gives a small confident nod while seated naturally in the chair, still framed large like c1 and c2. Keep soft background separation and enough negative space for optional post-production graphics later, while the generated footage itself stays free of in-scene ad text or UI.
shots.camera_movement: gentle settle into a locked portrait hero frame
shots.lighting: warm flattering light with a polished direct-response finish
shots.composition_and_set_dressing: portrait hero composition, rider and chair prominent, open space reserved for trust and pricing graphics
shots.transition_anchor: end on a still frame for the close
shots.voiceover_en: Now just five ninety-nine, with FDA-cleared safety, free returns, and easy PayPal financing.
shots.key_message: Trust and price close the sale.
shots.sfx: music lift and soft outdoor ambience

concepts.title: A Gentle Ramp Out
concepts.core_theme: A smooth start from home makes the whole day feel possible again.
concepts.main_theme: The first few feet should feel calm.
concepts.hook: The first few feet should feel calm.
concepts.cta: See the AnyWell YS16-1 PLUS in action.
concepts.visual_style: Finished ramp, yard edge, spouse nearby, controlled and reassuring.
concepts.continuity_rider_anchor: Keep the same heavy-set American senior husband and the same wife across all three shots. Keep the rider-chair scale substantial and natural like c1 and c2.
concepts.use_scenarios:
- porch threshold
- finished ramp
- yard-side close
concepts.additional_info: Use a finished ramp and calm home exterior. Do not recreate Jean's unfinished ramp.

shots.scene_description: A heavy-set American senior husband starts moving from a porch threshold toward a finished wooden ramp in the YS16-1 PLUS while his wife watches with a warm relieved expression. Use c1 and c2 proportion cues: broad supportive seat, natural heavy-set posture, the chair large and stable in frame, and the rider visibly comfortable rather than squeezed or towering over the backrest. Leave clean top-corner negative space, but keep the generated footage itself free of in-scene ad text or UI.
shots.camera_movement: slow front-side move that follows the start toward the ramp
shots.lighting: bright natural daylight with soft warm reflections from wood surfaces
shots.composition_and_set_dressing: portrait medium-wide porch and ramp frame, rider and chair prominent, little empty headroom, no exact source-house cues
shots.transition_anchor: end as the chair settles into the ramp descent
shots.voiceover_en: The first few feet should feel calm, not complicated.
shots.sfx: soft porch ambience and subtle wheel start

shots.scene_description: The same husband reaches level ground and turns smoothly toward a yard-side path with his right hand on the joystick while his wife walks nearby with hands free. Keep the rider-chair ratio believable like c1 and c2: fuller body naturally seated in the wide chair, strong wheel size, readable frame, and no toy-like scale. Leave clean negative space only, and keep the generated footage itself free of in-scene ad text or UI.
shots.camera_movement: smooth front-quarter arc that settles into a calm proof shot
shots.lighting: clear daylight with mild highlights and realistic shadows
shots.composition_and_set_dressing: portrait medium shot, chair and rider take most of the frame, finished ramp visible behind, yard ahead
shots.transition_anchor: end with the chair slowing naturally into level ground confidence
shots.voiceover_en: Smooth dual-motor power helps every start feel stable, steady, and easy to trust.
shots.key_message: Control and confidence are the proof.
shots.sfx: quiet wheel roll, light breeze, and yard ambience

shots.scene_description: The same couple stop and smile in a clean portrait hero frame built for optional post-production graphics. Keep the husband seated naturally and proportionately in the chair with strong c1 and c2 scale cues, and reserve negative space while the generated footage itself stays free of in-scene ad text or UI.
shots.camera_movement: slow settle into a warm close hero frame
shots.lighting: golden practical light with a polished direct-response finish
shots.composition_and_set_dressing: portrait close-medium frame, chair still readable, clean open space for the offer stack
shots.transition_anchor: end on a still frame for brand lockup
shots.voiceover_en: Get FDA-cleared safety, free returns, and simple PayPal financing for families who need help now.
shots.key_message: The close stacks trust with urgency.
shots.sfx: music rise and gentle outdoor ambience
